claim: Supervisor pattern in LangGraph enables hierarchical multi-agent orchestration with explicit handoff protocols
actionable: Use LangGraph Supervisor to create multi-agent systems where a supervisor routes tasks to specialized agents and coordinates handoffs

claim: Message history inheritance in supervisor systems allows agents to access task context from supervisor automatically
actionable: Design supervisors that pass full message history to sub-agents so they inherit task context without explicit duplication

claim: Configure output_mode in supervisor handoffs to control whether only final agent responses or full agent history is passed back
actionable: Use output_mode to tune supervisor efficiency: choose 'summary' for lightweight handoffs or 'full' for detailed reasoning traces

claim: Hierarchical supervisors can manage supervisors that manage agents, creating org-chart-like agent teams
actionable: Organize large multi-agent systems as trees of supervisors for scalability and domain separation
